rationale: Review 2 catches the same map_one'/map_mul' defeq issue but with a non-circular fix, plus three additional real problems (instFiberMulAction rfl, smul_fiber_mk's by-simpa-in-statement, fiberHomeomorph_eq_iff's redundant have), all confirmed in the diff; Review 1's primary fix suggestion is circular and it misses the other three issues entirely.
